Thanks for sending a pull request! Please fill out the sections below.

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Why is it needed? Keep it concise. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] fix — bug fix (non-breaking change that resolves an issue)
- [ ] feat — new feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] refactor — code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] test — adding or updating tests
- [ ] chore — build, tooling, or maintenance

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Fixes #456 -->

<!-- Step-by-step instructions for a reviewer to verify the change locally. -->

2.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests have been added or updated to cover the change
- [ ] Documentation has been updated (README, docs/, code comments) if needed
- [ ] Lint passes cleanly (`make lint` / `npm run lint` / equivalent)
- [ ] I have self-reviewed my own code
